name: Jinlongyu Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Jinlongyu Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and service of wires and cables in China. The company offers low smoke halogen free, low smoke halogen free flame retardant, fire resistant low smoke halogen, fire resistant, flame retardant, and aluminum alloy wires and cables, as well as waterproof, anti-ant, branch cables, etc. It also provides PVC insulated and sheathed power cables; and XLPE insulated power cables. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
